title: Venezuelan Avocado Salad
description: A refreshing and flavorful salad originating from Venezuela, made with ripe avocados, mixed greens, and a tangy dressing.

ingredients.name: mixed greens
ingredients.notes: such as arugula, spinach, or lettuce

ingredients.name: salad
ingredients.notes: shredded carrots, chopped cilantro, or crumbled queso fresco

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine mashed avocado, mixed greens, red onion, and cherry tomatoes.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together lime juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper for the dressing.
3. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
4. Sprinkle shredded carrots, chopped cilantro, or crumbled queso fresco over the salad.
